title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: GRAND RONDE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive behavioral health services, including mental health evaluations and treatment, counseling, substance use disorder treatment, medication management, peer support specialists, transportation coordination, and help connecting with community resources. 9615 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: Native Americans and Tribal services employees (and family members on health insurance plan) Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm, Thursday 9:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 879-2026 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 879-2026 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Polk and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Thursday 9:30am-5pm Services: Community Mental Health Agencies * Native American Community Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GRAND RONDE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER
